// CommonGoals: Personal instanced loot for each player who tagged a creature. Each qualifying player gets their own Corpse at the creature's location with an independent loot roll. AutoLoot applies to personal corpses naturally.
// RequiredAchievementTier: Loremaster Achievement Tier required per player (FakeInt 11050). Default 1 = Tier 1.
// MinDamagePercent: Fraction of total creature health dealt to qualify (0 = any tag). 0.05 = 5% minimum.
// MaxPersonalCorpsesPerKill: Cap on personal corpses spawned per kill (prevents spam on crowded fights).
// PersonalCorpseLifetimeSeconds: Seconds before personal corpse auto-decays. Default 300 = 5 min.
// NotifyOnPersonalLoot: Send a system message to the player when their personal corpse spawns.
// LootTierOverride: Force a specific loot tier (1–8) for personal corpses. -1 = use creature tier.
